# Final Review and Refresh Loop

## 목표

발행 전 최종 점검과, 발행 후 refresh 우선순위 판단을 일관된 체크리스트로 묶는다.

---

## 1. pre-publish checklist

- [ ] title matches search intent
- [ ] meta description gives a click reason
- [ ] H1 is singular and aligned with title
- [ ] first 100 words contain a direct answer or promise
- [ ] core sections cover the expected query family
- [ ] internal links are present and contextual
- [ ] at least some claims have citations where needed
- [ ] snippet-friendly blocks exist where appropriate
- [ ] FAQ is visible if FAQ schema will be used
- [ ] AI-sounding filler has been removed

### AI-pattern sanity check

아래가 보이면 마지막에 한 번 더 다듬는다.

- em dash 과다 사용
- evidence 없는 promotional adjectives
- vague source attribution
- keyword stuffing
- generic conclusion only

필요하면 writing-clearly의 품질 게이트를 같이 적용한다.

---

## 2. CTR diagnosis

| 상황 | 먼저 볼 것 |
| --- | --- |
| position은 괜찮은데 CTR이 낮다 | title, meta, SERP differentiation |
| CTR도 낮고 rank도 낮다 | intent fit, page type, content quality |
| CTR 하락이 최근에 시작됐다 | SERP feature 변화, competitors' title shifts, freshness |

### title/meta rewrite 우선순위

1. title promise and intent fit
2. specificity and angle
3. meta CTA and proof
4. year / bracket / number modifiers

---

## 3. refresh triggers

다음 중 하나면 refresh 후보로 본다.

- stats or examples are stale
- competing pages changed structure significantly
- position stays flat while query family shifts
- title/meta no longer match SERP expectations
- AI-citation 경쟁에서 출처와 factual density가 약함

---

## 4. refresh workflow

1. re-check intent and SERP
2. update title/meta if CTR issue exists
3. update sections that lost freshness
4. add stronger citations, tables, FAQ, examples if needed
5. re-score on-page quality

---

## 5. final output pattern

```markdown
## Final SEO Review

- Overall readiness: publish / revise / high risk
- Strong areas:
- Weak areas:
- Recommended next fixes:

## Refresh Backlog

| Page | Reason | Priority |
| --- | --- | --- |
| /example | stale stats | high |
```
